subcodes.first_line: Glorified art Thou, O my God! Thou beholdest my dwelling place in the prison of mine enemies and my seat within the confinement of the wicked, wherein [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: فسبحانک اللهم یا الهی تشهد مقری فی سجن الاعدا و مقعدی فی حبس الاشقیا بحیث
subcodes.subjects: @suffering and imprisonment, @walking the spiritual path; spiritual wayfaring; the virtuous life
